name: dev.unity2foxglove.sdk
description: Real-time data streaming from Unity to Foxglove for visualization. MCAP compression DLLs (K4os LZ4 stack, System.IO.Pipelines, ZstdSharp) are bundled in Runtime/Plugins/compression/.

samples.description: Minimal Unity scene for verifying Transform, SceneUpdate, Camera, and Foxglove layout.
Full demo scene mirroring the repository demo project, including Parameters, Services, FoxRun, MCAP, and playback workflows.
Guided Unity-to-ROS2 bridge sample with sidecar launch kit, health preflight, and Foxglove layout.
Drop Phase138MazeDemoBootstrap onto an empty GameObject and press Play. Procedurally builds a maze and a WASD-driven vehicle with a Virtual LiDAR streaming to Foxglove via /unity/point_cloud.
